1.content:
Your name is John and you had just discovered the ability to possess any fictional character by looking at said character through any medium. It could be a book and reading the description provided or simply looking at a picture or accurate drawing and simply willing for the possession to begin. The best part about this ability is that everything about this being you possess is at your disposal. Personality, body, finances, smarts, all of it was at your fingertips. Another fascinating thing was that if you ever got bored of your life, you could leave back to your original body and do it again.

Since your first day of college started in thirty minutes, you begin to have cold feet. Why should i go to college when i can become anyone in an alternate reality. Moving over to your computer/bookshelf you browse before selecting?


Who do you become
1.title: Change of scenery

11.content:
Open your streaming service, you choose to watch a ________ movie

superhero

11.title: movie character

13.content: any of the big four?
13.title: anime character

131.content: Turning your computer to Youtube, You decide to watch your favorite anime One Piece pre-time skip. Deciding it would be fun to live in an anime version of water world, you decide to possess_______
131.title: One piece (before timeskip)

1313.content: Obviously you are going to choose a sea king right? right?
1313.title: animal

13131.content:
Last option chaper

small 200-999 ft

medium 1000-2000 ft

large 2000+ ft (start in calm belt)
13131.title: sea king

131313.content: Deciding that the life of a sea leviathan would be better than a dead end job and college, you will yourself into the body of the black and white sea beast from episode 55. Coming up out of the water, now in possession of your new body, you spot the Going Merry on the bridge of your nose. Smiling to yourself at your new possibilities you tilt your head forward dropping the ship as you slide back underwater, your massive body easily responding to your demands as you swim away. Deciding that since you are the largest sea king that the one piece universe created before they decided that another beast of your massive proportions was ridiculous, you knew the sea was safely yours. You also knew that there were a few who could challenge you, such as White Beard and Dracule Mihawk (Hawk Eyes). Not wanting to find your new self sliced in half you disappear under the waves to learn Haki. Besides what would be the Point of messing with people if they killed you before you could do so.
131313.title: large

1313132.content:
Having successfully learned Haki, you decide that it would be fun to mess with some boats. Spotting one on the surface above you, you notice that its a little larger than the one's you see normally. Moving closer to it, you notice that for a ship its huge, about as long as your head is wide. Knowing that this is white beards ship you decide to see how good they are.

More like jump scare but whatever.

Diving back down then quickly swimming back up, you propel yourself pout of the water, managing to get about a fourth of your massive girth above the water, and quickly hear the white beard crew screaming down below, White Beard himself looking up with a bit of worry that you might hit his boat. Deciding to continue to screw with them, you duck back underwater before breaching on the other side of their ship. Curious to see what their next action might be, you decide just to tower above them, using your tail to lift them slightly out of the water, halting all movement.

Does white beard attack?
1313132.title: time skip one year

1422.title: female
